name: Lybrin Table Lamp W/ USB Port - 19.25 Inch Height - TBL4455 - Black - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with Lybrin, a versatile 19.25 inch table lamp that embodies modern elegance. Expertly crafted from iron and complemented by a sleek fabric shade, this black lamp seamlessly integrates into any decor, enhancing both function and style. Perfect for your home office, bedroom, or living area, Lybrin offers not just light but convenience with its built-in USB port, keeping your devices charged and within reach. Experience the perfect blend of design and practicality, making Lybrin an ideal choice for those who value functionality and aesthetics.
